column1: I can't remember how ________ time I spend at the shop.
We need ________ boxes to pack all these clothes.
I just have _______ friends, but they are really good.
The dog has _______ food in the bowl.
I can _______ hear what she is saying.
My mum tells me that I sing ________ .
She looked ________ at me when I arrived late.
... you ever ... (to be) to New York?
